Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Income Tax Act (tax credit for dues paid to veteransâ organizations)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Income Tax Act (tax credit for dues paid to veteransâ organizations)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Income Tax Act to provide a refundable tax credit to an individual in respect of membership dues paid to a branch of the Royal Canadian Legion or Army, Navy and Air Force Veterans in Canada Association or to a prescribed veteransâ organization.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and the House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: The Income Tax Act is amended by adding the following after section 122.51:

Section.MarginalNote: Deemed payment on account of tax â membership dues
Section.Text: Where a return of income is filed in respect of an eligible individual described in section 122.51 for a particular taxation year that ends at the end of a calendar year, there is deemed to be paid at the end of the particular year on account of the individualâs tax payable under this Part for the particular year an amount equal to the amount that the individual paid during the year as membership dues to a branch of the Royal Canadian Legion or Army, Navy and Air Force Veterans in Canada Association or to a prescribed veteransâ organization.

Subsection.Text: Paragraph 152(1)(b) of the Act is replaced by the following:

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: the amount of tax, if any, deemed by subsection 120(2) or (2.2), 122.5(3) or 122.51(2), section 122.52 or subsection 122.7(2) or (3), 125.4(3), 125.5(3), 127.1(1), 127.41(3) or 210.2(3) or (4) to be paid on account of the taxpayerâs tax payable under this Part for the year.

Subsection.Text: Paragraph 152(4.2)(b) of the Act is replaced by the following:

Paragraph.Label: (b)
Paragraph.Text: redetermine the amount, if any, deemed by subsection 120(2) or (2.2), 122.5(3) or 122.51(2), section 122.52 or subsection 122.7(2) or (3), 122.8(2) or (3), 127.1(1), 127.41(3) or 210.2(3) or (4) to be paid on account of the taxpayerâs tax payable under this Part for the year or deemed by subsection 122.61(1) to be an overpayment on account of the taxpayerâs liability under this Part for the year.
